name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/2 teaspoons freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
Combine allspice, thyme, cayenne pepper, black pepper, sage, nutmeg, cinnamon, salt, garlic powder, and sugar in a large bowl. Gradually whisk in the olive oil, soy sauce, vinegar, orange juice, and lime juice. Stir in the Scotch bonnet pepper, chopped onion, and green onions until well combined.
Add chicken breasts (6 to 8 oz each) to the marinade, cover, and marinate for at least 1 hour, or longer if possible.
Preheat an outdoor grill. Remove breasts from marinade and grill for 6 minutes on each side or until fully cooked. Baste with marinade while grilling.
Serve grilled chicken with reserved leftover marinade for dipping (if desired). Makes 4 servings.
